testcase.name: test_login_with_invalid_pin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_terminal.py:53: in test_login_with_invalid_pin assert response.status_code == 401 E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_categories

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing category: Vorspeise assert 'Vorspeise' in [{'addon_group_ids': [], 'name': 'Pizza', 'sort_order': 0}, {'addon_group_ids': ['4566e231-9e15-46f9-82a9-f52073708154'], 'name': 'Pizza Classics', 'sort_order': 0}, {'addon_group_ids': ['4566e231-9e15-46f9-82a9-f52073708154'], 'name': 'Pizza Signatures', 'sort_order': 0}, {'addon_group_ids': ['4566e231-9e15-46f9-82a9-f52073708154'], 'name': 'Pizza Specials', 'sort_order': 0}, {'addon_group_ids': ['d1e43a31-7fb7-45fd-ac55-93c2acd82695'], 'name': 'Salate', 'sort_order': 0}, {'addon_group_ids': [], 'name': 'Pasta', 'sort_order': 3}, ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_terminal.py:128: in test_get_categories assert cat in categories, f"Missing category: {cat}" E AssertionError: Missing category: Vorspeise E assert 'Vorspeise' in [{'addon_group_ids': [], 'name': 'Pizza', 'sort_order': 0}, {'addon_group_ids': ['4566e231-9e15-46f9-82a9-f52073708154'], 'name': 'Pizza Classics', 'sort_order': 0}, {'addon_group_ids': ['4566e231-9e15-46f9-82a9-f52073708154'], 'name': 'Pizza Signatures', 'sort_order': 0}, {'addon_group_ids': ['4566e231-9e15-46f9-82a9-f52073708154'], 'name': 'Pizza Specials', 'sort_order': 0}, {'addon_group_ids': ['d1e43a31-7fb7-45fd-ac55-93c2acd82695'], 'name': 'Salate', 'sort_order': 0}, {'addon_group_ids': [], 'name': 'Pasta', 'sort_order': 3}, ...]

testcase.name: test_create_menu_item
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_terminal.py:327: in test_create_menu_item assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
